name: Shrimp and Vegetables with Linguine
recipeInstructions:
1. Freshly ground black pepper.
2. Cook linguine in 3 quarts boiling water until done but firm to the bite. Set aside and keep warm.
3. Meanwhile, in a 10-inch skillet, sauté onion and celery for 2 minutes in olive oil.
4. Add sweet red pepper, broccoli, and half of the chicken broth. Cover and cook for 2 minutes.
5. Mix the remaining chicken broth with cornstarch and set aside.
6. Stir in shrimp, garlic, green onions, reserved chicken broth, cornstarch mixture (white wine, lemon juice), and black pepper into the vegetables.
7. Cover and cook for 2 to 3 minutes or until the shrimp turns pink and the sauce thickens.
8. Serve immediately over cooked noodles. Serves 4.
